name: Tibet Mineral Development Co., LTD
summary: Tibet Mineral Development Co., LTD engages in mining business. The company explores for chromite, copper, lithium, and boron deposits. Its products electrolytic copper; industrial-grade lithium carbonate, lithium hydroxide monohydrate, and battery-grade lithium carbonate; and lithium salts. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Lhasa, China.
